nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Defines the Understand-Anything analysis exclusion policy and records commented starter patterns derived from the Python-oriented repository ignore rules. It currently keeps the suggested directories, generated artifacts, caches, and test patterns available for selective activation without excluding them by default.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses gitignore-compatible glob syntax, with every repository-specific suggestion commented out so built-in exclusions remain the only active rules.

nodes.name: config.json
nodes.summary: Configures Understand-Anything to generate the project's knowledge-graph summaries, descriptions, tags, and learning content in English.

nodes.name: python-package-cicd-agent-guide.md
nodes.summary: Provides an operational playbook for reliable Python package CI/CD, covering single-source version metadata, changelog-backed releases, pull-request checks, idempotent GitHub Releases, PyPI publishing, Dependabot, branch protection, and release failure recovery. It includes ready-to-adapt TOML, YAML, Python, and shell examples plus a final checklist for future automation agents.
nodes.languageNotes: The Markdown guide embeds complete TOML, YAML, Python, and shell fragments to express a reproducible GitHub Actions and PyPI release workflow.
